overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character with glowing blue skin and red shorts walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The character navigates covered walkways, crosses busy intersections, and moves through dense crowds surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant digital billboards and Japanese-inspired signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated bank structure

agents.ego_description: the player character with glowing blue skin and red shorts walks steadily along the sidewalk beneath the Marmur Bank overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walks toward the camera on the right side of the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'MARMUR BANK' suspended over the street on a metal framework
bright blue neon sign with Japanese text 'ホテル' indicating a 24-hour hotel
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the left building facade
elevated highway or walkway structure creating a covered canopy over the street
modern street lamp with horizontal light bar illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered cyberpunk city walkway beneath the Marmur Bank overpass. The player character walks forward along the wet concrete sidewalk as neon signs cast colorful reflections. The space feels enclosed by the elevated structure overhead, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with marked crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps off the covered sidewalk and enters the open street intersection
blue sports car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk at the Carmel street intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: sleek blue sports car drives through the intersection, passing in front of the character
pedestrian in white coat walks parallel to the ego character across the crosswalk

entered.detail: red street sign with white text 'Carmel' mounted on a traffic light pole
broad asphalt intersection marked with yellow zebra stripes for pedestrian crossing
tall pole with red traffic light and pedestrian signal displaying walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered walkway into an open intersection, crossing the street at the Carmel crosswalk. A blue sports car passes through the intersection as the character navigates the zebra-striped crossing. The environment opens up with more sky visible and traffic lights controlling the moderate vehicle flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve around the intersection corner
yellow taxi cab drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts including a 'BEEP' sign and glass office buildings

entered.detail: tall vertical neon sign with purple text 'BEEP' on the right side building
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and horizontal neon lighting strips
yellow taxi cab parked along the curb on the left side of the street
metal public bench situated on the sidewalk near the street lamp

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street lined with glass office towers and neon storefronts, the character passes the 'BEEP' sign and a parked yellow taxi. The sidewalk curves gently as the character maintains a steady pace, with moderate pedestrian traffic flowing in the same direction and sparse vehicle movement on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial plaza with multiple digital billboards and dense pedestrian gathering

events.description: crowd density increases significantly as character approaches the plaza crosswalk
character stops at the crosswalk edge waiting for traffic while surrounded by dense crowd

agents.ego_description: navigates through a densely crowded plaza area and stops at a crosswalk surrounded by groups of pedestrians waiting to cross

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright orange pants walks ahead of the ego character toward the crosswalk
group of three pedestrians standing at the crosswalk corner waiting for the signal

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'BYTE' in red neon letters on the right building
massive digital billboard displaying a holographic face advertisement high above the street
brightly lit storefront with yellow neon signage and green accents
wide pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes leading across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a densely crowded commercial plaza dominated by massive holographic billboards and the 'BYTE' store sign. Navigating through thick crowds gathered at a crosswalk, the character stops at the intersection edge surrounded by pedestrians. The area features wide paved tiles and intense neon lighting from multiple large-format digital advertisements overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched commercial plaza. It begins on a covered walkway beneath the Marmur Bank overpass, where the character moves along wet concrete reflecting the glow of nearby neon signs. As the character exits the enclosure, the scene opens into the wide Carmel intersection, crossing a zebra-striped street as a blue sports car glides past. The camera then follows the character along a curving commercial street lined with glass office towers and a parked yellow taxi before the environment shifts again into a densely packed plaza. Finally, the space becomes saturated with intense light from massive holographic billboards and the BYTE store sign as the character merges into a thick crowd at a busy intersection.
